session.user: Run these tests and report results: uv run pytest tests/unit/cli/commands/pr/test_pr_dispatch_operation.py tests/commands/pr/test_dispatch.py tests/unit/cli/commands/pr/test_dispatch_cmd.py -v Report the pass/fail status of each test. If any fail, show the full failure output.
session.assistant: I'll run the specified tests and report the results.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run pytest on three dispatch test files with verbose output
